task_completion.description: Create a two-page diagram in draw.io with the specified page names.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the bottom of the draw.io interface for two page tabs named exactly '4-Bit Ripple Carry Adder' and 'Full Adder Gate Level'.

task_completion.description: Add four Full Adder blocks to the block-level page.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the '4-Bit Ripple Carry Adder' page, look for four distinct rectangular blocks labeled FA0, FA1, FA2, and FA3.

task_completion.description: Connect the Full Adder blocks in a ripple carry chain with appropriate inputs, outputs, and a grounded first carry.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for lines connecting the FA blocks in a chain (carry out of one to carry in of the next). Ensure there are labels for inputs (A0-A3, B0-B3) and outputs (S0-S3, Cout or C4), and a ground symbol or '0' connection on the first carry input of FA0.

task_completion.description: Create the gate-level schematic of a single Full Adder using XOR, AND, and OR gates.
task_completion.visual_evidence: On the 'Full Adder Gate Level' page, look for standard logic gate symbols (XOR, AND, OR) connected together to form a Full Adder circuit.

task_completion.description: Add labels and Boolean equation annotations to the gate-level schematic.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for text boxes on the gate-level page containing the equations 'Sum = A XOR B XOR Cin' and 'Cout = (A AND B) OR (Cin AND (A XOR B))'.

task_completion.description: Save the diagram as a .drawio file and export the block-level page as a .png file to the Desktop.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the files 'ripple_carry_adder.drawio' and 'ripple_carry_adder.png' appearing on the Desktop or in a file manager window.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the draw.io graphical interface to create the diagram.
integrity.visual_evidence: The draw.io application window should be visible in the screenshots with the diagram being actively edited on the canvas, rather than the agent writing XML in a text editor or terminal.

integrity.description: Verify the diagram was built step-by-step rather than pasted from a pre-existing source.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the diagram in various stages of completion (e.g., adding shapes, drawing lines, typing labels), not just suddenly appearing fully complete.

integrity.description: Verify the PNG was exported using the draw.io application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for the draw.io 'Export as' dialog or file save dialog being used to create the PNG file, rather than a command-line conversion tool.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The diagram must contain at least 2 pages. The required blocks on the block-level page are 'FA0', 'FA1', 'FA2', and 'FA3'. The required gates on the gate-level page are 'XOR', 'AND', and 'OR'. The diagram must contain at least 15 edges (connections) in total. The final files must be named 'ripple_carry_adder.drawio' and 'ripple_carry_adder.png' and saved to the Desktop. 'C4' is an acceptable alternative label for 'Cout'.
